betterquesting:10.desc:8:
And here we go, the medium of Recursion, Infinity, isolated as its own form of matter.
No, not fully isolated, this is not true Infinity, but it is as close to it as matter can get.
Regular and yet changing, periodic and yet lacking period.
A strange bit of reality for sure.
If Definition contains bits from every aspect of reality, while being distinct, bits of infinity are contained in every aspect of reality, while not being fully realized.
The great book that inspired all great books, if one such book were to exist.
